race.comment: Open race. MISS LOLA (10) can run well at each way odds down in the weights. She got her maiden out of the way nicely last start at Sandown Lakeside having just missed fresh with a mile back to third. The Waller stable scratched from Wednesday where she was fancied to give impressive winner Queen Peta serious opposition. SIGNATURE SCENT (2) is off a short spell here having measured up to some good races in Adelaide last campaign. She sets up nicely from the low gate with the goldmine 3kg claim for Jabez Johnstone. CAVALRY GIRL (1) won very well last time at Caulfield Heath. Some niggle to 1100m here but she'll give a bold sight. LADY VERITY (6) resumes. She's got a nice profile having won a couple last time in and has been jumping out very well, no shock to see the market find her early albeit she'll need a career best. RESTLESS WIND (7) next best.
